title: The Dowager & Daisy having a sweet moment 😊

sentences.en: But you can't have been false to him. You were his wife for only half an hour.
sentences.ko: 하지만 당신이 그에게 거짓말을 할 리는 없죠. 당신은 그와 단 30분 동안만 아내였으니까요.

sentences.en: It's difficult to explain, m'lady. Well, try.
I led him on. When he was wounded, I let him think that I loved him.
sentences.ko: 제가 그를 유혹했어요. 그가 다쳤을 때, 제가 그를 사랑한다고 생각하게 했죠.

sentences.en: I thought he'd cheer him up, give him something to live for.
sentences.ko: 그가 기운을 내고, 살아갈 이유를 주고 싶었어요.

sentences.en: And you did all this when you didn't even like him?
sentences.ko: 그리고 당신이 그를 좋아하지도 않았을 때 이런 일을 했나요?

sentences.en: No, I did like him very, very much. Everyone liked our William.
sentences.ko: 아니요, 저는 그를 정말, 정말 많이 좋아했어요. 모두가 우리 윌리엄을 좋아했죠.

sentences.en: Oh, so you married him to keep his spirits up at the end?
sentences.ko: 아, 그래서 당신은 그의 기분을 좋게 하려고 그와 결혼한 건가요?

sentences.en: Well, forgive me, but that doesn't sound unloving.
sentences.ko: 음, 미안하지만, 그건 사랑이 없는 것 같지 않네요.

sentences.en: To me, that sounds as if you loved him a great deal.
sentences.ko: 저에게는, 그게 당신이 그를 많이 사랑했다는 것처럼 들려요.

sentences.en: Sorry to keep you waiting, Mama. I've been outside. I was looking for...
sentences.ko: 기다리게 해서 미안해요, 엄마. 밖에 있었어요. 뭘 찾고 있었거든요...
